action.reasoning: Observation: DKT_Target_Features achieved a new best AUC of 0.7679. The explicit historical features (attempts, correct_attempts) helped significantly. Analysis: We can further enrich the feature set by adding 'recency' (time since last attempt on the same skill) and 'total_corrects' (overall student success rate). I will implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext which includes these new features, both as embeddings and as continuous normalized features projected through a linear layer. Decision: Implement DKT_Target_Features_Ext, update precompute_features to extract the new features, and train for 25 epochs.
